package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_sentinel_error_allocated_per_call: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag identical sentinel errors allocated inside functions instead of package-level variables.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule533NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario533Negative(records []Rule533NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
